title: Projects
description: Operate project sites, credentials, domains, and feature availability from one console.
deleteConfirmDescription: Project "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirmInput: Type the project name to confirm
deleteConfirmHint: Enter the project name exactly as shown

form.name: Project Name
form.seoDescriptionPlaceholder: A short description of your project...
form.nameTooLong: Project name must be 100 characters or fewer.
form.siteNameTooLong: Site name must be 100 characters or fewer.

newDescription: Create a new project with its own settings.
editDescription: Update the project name and site settings.
consoleDescription: Review operational health, credentials, domains, and feature access for this project site.
statusSuspendedHint: Review the message above or retry provisioning. Contact support if the issue persists.

featuresPage.title: Project Features
featuresPage.description: Manage enabled features and feature-specific settings for {name}.

unsaved.label: Unsaved changes
unsaved.confirmLeave: Your unsaved changes will be lost. Leave this page?

customDomain.title: Custom Domain
customDomain.description: Connect your own domain to this project. Visitors will see your domain instead of the default subdomain.
customDomain.domainHint: Enter a domain you own. Point its CNAME record to the value shown below.
customDomain.dnsDescription: Add this CNAME record in your domain registrar's DNS settings:
customDomain.dnsHint: DNS changes can take up to 48 hours to propagate. Click Verify DNS after adding the record.
customDomain.conflictDomain: This domain is already used by another project

authConfig.clerkDescription: Connect this project to its own Clerk Application. Create one at clerk.com and paste the keys below.
authConfig.clerkPublishableKeyDescription: Found in your Clerk Dashboard under API Keys. Starts with pk_.
authConfig.clerkSecretKeyDescription: Found in your Clerk Dashboard under API Keys. Starts with sk_. Keep this secret.
authConfig.databaseDescription: Connect this project to its own dedicated database.
authConfig.databaseUrlDescription: PostgreSQL connection string for this project's database.

create.step1Description: Choose a name for your new project.
create.step2Description: Provide your database. Clerk keys enable user authentication on your project site and can be added later.
create.clerkNote: Clerk keys are needed for authentication. You can add them after creating the project.

publicPage.title: Welcome to {name}
publicPage.description: This is your project's front page, where ideas start turning into something real.

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Access and manage your installed modules
